# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  GITLAB_USER_NAME: "CI Bot"

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building the project..."
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying the project..."
    - echo "Deploying feature: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://your.production.url
  only:
    - master
  after_script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        git tag -a "release-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE// /-}" -m "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
        git push origin "release-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE// /-}"
      fi
  notifications:
    email:
      recipients:
        - developer@example.com
      on_success: always
      on_failure: always
